items.title: Neurologic Diagnoses Before and After Traumatic Brain Injury: A Retrospective Cohort Study of Older Veterans.
items.abstract: Traumatic brain injury (TBI) during mid-to-late life is associated with increased risk of stroke, Parkinson disease (PD), epilepsy, and dementia. These conditions may also predispose to TBI. Thus, we investigated the incidence of dementia, stroke, epilepsy, and PD in older Veterans before and after acute TBI to determine whether there is a bidirectional association. In this retrospective cohort study, we identified Veterans aged ≥55 years who received care at US Veterans Health Affairs (VHA) facilities between October 1, 1999, and September 30, 2021, and who had acute TBI (concurrent International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code + emergency department visit + brain imaging) using VHA databases. We matched participants 3:1 to a non-TBI cohort based on age, sex, race/ethnicity, and visit date. Incident stroke, PD, epilepsy, and dementia were determined from ICD codes one year before and after TBI in the TBI cohort and over a two-year period in the non-TBI cohort. We excluded those with prevalent conditions at least 1 year before the study period. Incidence rate ratios (IRRs) and 95% CIs were calculated by comparing the pre-TBI period with the post-TBI period and with the non-TBI cohort. We included 13,801 Veterans with acute TBI and a balanced cohort of 41,403 Veterans without TBI (average age 77.8 years, 96.5% male). Veterans with TBI had higher incidence rates of the 4 conditions before TBI compared with the non-TBI cohort: incidence of stroke (IRR = 3.2 [95% CI 2.9-3.5]), dementia (IRR = 3.1, [95% CI 2.9-3.4]), and PD (IRR = 3.0 [95% CI 2.4-3.7]) was 3 times higher, and that of epilepsy was over 4 times higher (IRR = 4.4 [95% CI 3.6-5.4]). Results were slightly attenuated but remained significant after adjusting for comorbidities and health care utilization. Veterans with TBI also had higher incidence rates 1 year after TBI compared with the pre-TBI period. Incident stroke (IRR = 1.83 [95% CI 1.65-2.04]) and epilepsy (IRR = 2.29 [95% CI 1.88-2.78]) rates were twofold higher; dementia incidence was also higher (IRR = 1.24 [95% CI 1.12-1.38]), but PD rates did not differ (IRR = 1.06 [95% CI 0.82-1.36]). We found a bidirectional association between TBI and several neurologic conditions, with higher incidence rates preceding TBI and higher rates after TBI. Generalizability to non-Veteran populations is uncertain. Future studies may determine whether TBI prevention measures for adults with stroke, dementia, PD, and epilepsy are warranted.
items.summary_ja:
背景：中高年期以降の外傷性脳損傷（TBI）は、脳卒中、パーキンソン病（PD）、てんかん、認知症のリスク増加と関連し、これらの神経疾患がTBIの発症リスクを高める可能性もある。  
方法：米国退役軍人保健機関のデータベースを用い、1999年から2021年に急性TBIを受けた55歳以上の退役軍人13,801名と、年齢・性別等で3対1にマッチした非TBI群41,403名を対象に、TBI前後1年間および非TBI群の2年間の脳卒中、PD、てんかん、認知症の発症率を比較した。既往疾患のある者は除外。  
結果：TBI群はTBI前から非TBI群に比べ、脳卒中（IRR=3.2）、認知症（IRR=3.1）、PD（IRR=3.0）、てんかん（IRR=4.4）の発症率が有意に高かった。TBI後も脳卒中（IRR=1.83）、てんかん（IRR=2.29）、認知症（IRR=1.24）の発症率が上昇し、PDは差がなかった。  
結論：TBIと神経疾患には双方向の関連が認められ、これらの疾患がTBIのリスク要因であると同時に、TBI後の発症リスクも増加することが示唆された。非退役軍人への一般化は不明であり、今後はこれら疾患患者に対するTBI予防策の検討が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、55歳以上の退役軍人を対象に、外傷性脳損傷（TBI）前後の認知症、脳卒中、てんかん、パーキンソン病（PD）の発症率を比較した。TBI患者は非TBI群に比べ、これら神経疾患の発症率がTBI前から高く、TBI後も脳卒中やてんかん、認知症の発症率がさらに増加した。PDはTBI後の増加が認められなかった。これら疾患とTBIには双方向の関連が示唆され、予防対策の検討が必要とされた。

items.title: Time-Dependent Association Between Breast Cancer and Risk of Ischemic Stroke: A Nationwide Cohort Study.
items.abstract: The association between breast cancer diagnosis and treatment and the risk of incident ischemic stroke remains unclear. We investigated ischemic stroke risk among breast cancer survivors and evaluated associations by age, follow-up duration, and type of cancer treatment. We conducted a nationwide, retrospective, matched cohort study using the Korean National Health Insurance Service database. Women aged 18 years and older with newly diagnosed breast cancer who underwent breast cancer surgery between January 2010 and December 2016 and had no prior stroke were identified. Each was matched 1:3 by birth year to cancer-free women. The primary outcome was first ischemic stroke, defined as hospitalization with International Classification of Disease, Tenth Revision codes I63/I64 plus inpatient brain CT or MRI. Subdistribution hazard ratios (sHRs) and 95% CIs were estimated using Fine-Gray models that accounted for death as a competing risk and adjusted for sociodemographic factors and cardiovascular and non-CV comorbidities. We analyzed 107,606 breast cancer surgery survivors (mean age, 50.0 years) and 322,818 matched cancer-free women. Over a mean 7.2-year follow-up, ischemic stroke occurred in 1,155 survivors (1.07%). Stroke risk was elevated shortly after breast cancer diagnosis (1-year sHR 1.59; 95% CI 1.34-1.89; 3-year sHR 1.17; 95% CI 1.05-1.30) compared with cancer-free women, with stronger associations at 3 and 6 months after diagnosis across all age groups. Over the long term, survivors had a slightly lower risk of stroke (sHR 0.94; 95% CI 0.88-1.00), and in a 1-year landmark analysis including only event-free individuals, the risk was lower (sHR 0.87, 95% CI 0.81-0.93). Among survivors, anthracycline use (sHR 1.25) and combined tamoxifen-aromatase inhibitor therapy (sHR 1.49) were associated with increased risk of stroke, whereas radiation therapy was associated with decreased risk (sHR 0.84). These associations attenuated and became nonsignificant beyond 1 year. Stroke risk was also higher among survivors with low income, hypertension, diabetes, or current smoking. The association between breast cancer and ischemic stroke risk is time dependent, with a short-term increase after diagnosis and treatment followed by a gradual decline over time. These findings highlight the need for proactive stroke risk management, including early CV assessment and ongoing monitoring for thromboembolic events during survivorship.
items.summary_ja: 本研究は、乳がん診断および治療と虚血性脳卒中リスクの関連を明らかにすることを目的とした。韓国の国民健康保険データベースを用い、2010～2016年に乳がん手術を受けた18歳以上の女性107,606名と、出生年で3倍にマッチさせたがん未罹患者322,818名を対象に後ろ向きコホート研究を実施した。平均7.2年の追跡期間中、乳がん生存者の脳卒中発症率は1.07％で、診断後1年以内にリスクが有意に上昇（1年後のサブ分布ハザード比1.59）し、特に診断後3～6か月で強かった。一方、長期的にはリスクはわずかに低下し、1年無事経過した群ではさらに低リスクであった。治療別では、アントラサイクリン系薬剤やタモキシフェンとアロマターゼ阻害剤の併用がリスク増加と関連し、放射線療法はリスク低下と関連したが、これらの影響は1年以降に弱まった。低所得や高血圧、糖尿病、喫煙者ではリスクが高かった。乳がんと虚血性脳卒中リスクの関連は時間依存的であり、診断直後のリスク増加を踏まえた早期の心血管評価と継続的な血栓塞栓症管理が重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、韓国の全国データベースを用い、乳がん手術後の女性10万7千人超と非がん女性約32万人を比較し、虚血性脳卒中リスクを検討した。診断後1年以内に脳卒中リスクが有意に上昇し、特に診断後3～6か月で顕著であった。アントラサイクリン系薬剤やタモキシフェン・アロマターゼ阻害剤併用療法はリスク増加と関連し、放射線療法はリスク低下に寄与した。長期的にはリスクは低下し、早期の心血管評価と継続的な管理が重要と示唆された。

items.title: Semaglutide and Risk of Adult-Onset Seizure: A Target Trial Emulation.
items.abstract: Adult-onset seizure reflects the burden of acquired brain insults, but established disease-modifying preventive strategies are limited. We evaluated whether semaglutide initiation is associated with a lower incidence of adult-onset seizure compared with sodium-glucose cotransporter 2 inhibitors (SGLT2i) and other glucose-lowering drugs (GLDs) in adults with type 2 diabetes. Using the  We analyzed 10,213 patients in the semaglutide (n = 2,586, mean age, 60.1 years; 56.8% female) vs other GLDs cohort (n = 7,627, mean age, 63.7 years; 54.2% female) and 8,605 patients in the semaglutide (n = 2,814, mean age, 60.5 years; 66.2% female) vs SGLT2i cohort (n = 5,791, mean age, 64.4 years; 47.3% female). Semaglutide was associated with a lower risk of adult-onset seizure compared with other GLDs (weighted HR 0.44 [95% CI 0.25-0.79]; 4-year risk difference -1.78% [95% CI -2.58 to -0.98]) and SGLT2i (weighted HR 0.48 [95% CI 0.27-0.85]; 4-year risk difference -1.46% [95% CI -2.41 to -0.51]). TMLE estimated risk differences per 1,000 persons of -14.20 (95% CI -18.33 to -10.07) vs other GLDs and -7.62 (95% CI -11.65 to -3.60) vs SGLT2i, corresponding to numbers needed to treat of 70 and 131, respectively. Mediation was minimal for HbA1c (2.4% vs other GLDs; 6.5% vs SGLT2i) and BMI (0% vs other GLDs; 0.7% vs SGLT2i). Semaglutide initiation was associated with a lower risk of adult-onset seizure compared with SGLT2i and other GLDs in patients with type 2 diabetes, independent of glycemic and weight effects. Residual confounding, low event counts, and shorter follow-up limit causal interpretation. This study provides Class II evidence that semaglutide use was associated with a lower risk of adult-onset seizures compared with other GLDs and SGLT2i.
items.summary_ja:
背景：成人発症てんかん発作は後天的な脳障害の負担を反映するが、効果的な予防策は限られている。  
方法：2型糖尿病患者を対象に、セマグルチド開始群とSGLT2阻害薬群およびその他の血糖降下薬群を比較し、成人発症てんかん発作の発生リスクを検討した。セマグルチド群はそれぞれ2,586例および2,814例、比較群は7,627例および5,791例で、平均年齢は約60～64歳であった。  
結果：セマグルチドは他の血糖降下薬群に比べ発作リスクを56%低減（HR 0.44）、SGLT2阻害薬群に比べ52%低減（HR 0.48）した。4年間のリスク差はそれぞれ-1.78%、-1.46%で、HbA1cやBMIの変化による媒介効果はごくわずかであった。  
結論：セマグルチド開始は血糖コントロールや体重変化に依存せず、2型糖尿病患者の成人発症てんかん発作リスクを低減する可能性が示された。ただし、観察研究の限界やイベント数の少なさから因果関係の解釈には注意が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: セマグルチドの開始は、2型糖尿病患者において、他の血糖降下薬やSGLT2阻害薬と比較して成人発症てんかん発作のリスクを有意に低減した。血糖値や体重変化による影響は小さく、治療効果は独立していると示唆された。ただし、観察研究の限界やイベント数の少なさから因果関係の確定には注意が必要である。本研究はセマグルチドのてんかん発作予防効果に関するクラスIIのエビデンスを提供する。

items.title: Mediation Analysis Between Brain Age, Disease-Modifying Factors, and Disability and Cognitive Performance in Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: The brain-predicted age difference (brain-PAD) is considered a marker of neurodegeneration in people with multiple sclerosis (pwMS) and is associated with greater disability and cognitive impairment. However, the impact of disease-modifying factors (DMFs) on brain-PAD remains unknown, as does the extent to which their effect on disability and cognition is mediated through brain-PAD. The goal of this study was to investigate this in pwMS using a same-age cohort to eliminate calendar age as a confounding factor. Brain age was determined using brainageR from 3-dimensional T1-weighted MRI scans, and brain-PAD was calculated as the difference between predicted and chronological age. Disability was evaluated with the Expanded Disability Status Scale (EDSS), the 9-hole peg test (9HPT), and timed 25-foot walk test (T25FWT). Cognitive function was assessed using the Minimal Assessment of Cognitive Function in MS battery and converted to  The study included 117 healthy controls (mean age 52.8 ± 1.1 years, 74.3% female) and 242 pwMS (mean age 52.8 ± 0.9 years, 70.6% female), with a median disease duration of 15.2 years (interquartile range [IQR] 8.2-24.5) and a median EDSS score of 3.5 (IQR 2.5-4.0). Smoking (β = 0.20,  DMFs unrelated to MS, particularly smoking, alcohol use, and BMI at 18 years, accelerate brain aging. Brain-PAD mediates these effects and contributes to worsening disability and cognition, underscoring the potential of lifestyle interventions to mitigate neurodegeneration and preserve function in pwMS.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）患者における脳の予測年齢差（brain-PAD）は神経変性の指標であり、障害や認知機能低下と関連するが、疾患修飾因子（DMFs）がbrain-PADに与える影響や、DMFsの障害・認知機能への影響がbrain-PADを介しているかは不明であった。  
方法：同年齢のMS患者242名（平均年齢52.8歳）と健康対照117名を対象に、3次元T1強調MRIからbrainageRを用いて脳年齢を推定し、brain-PADを算出。障害はEDSS、9ホールペグテスト、25フィート歩行テストで評価し、認知機能はMS用簡易認知評価バッテリーで測定した。  
結果：喫煙、飲酒、18歳時のBMIなどMSに直接関連しないDMFsがbrain-PADを加速させ、brain-PADは障害と認知機能低下の進行を媒介することが示された。  
結論：生活習慣因子が脳の老化を促進し、これがMS患者の機能障害や認知低下に寄与しているため、生活習慣改善による神経変性の抑制と機能維持の可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症患者（pwMS）において、脳の予測年齢差（brain-PAD）は神経変性の指標であり、障害や認知機能低下と関連する。本研究は、同年齢コホートを用いて、喫煙や飲酒、若年時のBMIなどの疾患修飾因子（DMFs）がbrain-PADに与える影響と、それが障害・認知機能に及ぼす媒介効果を検証した。結果、これらの因子はbrain-PADを介して脳老化を促進し、機能悪化に寄与することが示された。

items.title: Identifying MicroRNA Biomarkers in Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension: A Pilot Study.
items.abstract: Idiopathic intracranial hypertension (IIH) is characterized by raised intracranial pressure (ICP). It predominantly affects women with obesity and can cause disabling headaches and permanent visual loss. IIH is misdiagnosed in up to 40% of cases. Diagnosis and monitoring often rely on frequent invasive lumbar puncture. This pilot study aimed to identify serum microRNA (miRNA) markers associated with a diagnosis of IIH and disease activity and to assess their relevance in the CNS through identification in CSF. Serum and CSF samples from participants in the IIH-Weight Trial (a randomized controlled trial comparing the effectiveness of bariatric surgery with that of a community weight management intervention in lowering ICP, recruited 2014-2017) were analyzed at baseline (active disease) and 12 months (participants in remission with no papilledema). Eligible participants were adult women with active IIH (those without papilledema were excluded). Disease activity was assessed by quantifying the degree of papilledema using Spectralis spectral-domain optical coherence tomography. A panel of 40 candidate miRNAs was assessed. Comparator groups included participants with obesity or migraine. Analyses used Student  Five of 40 serum miRNAs showed significantly lower expression in active IIH (n = 9; 100% female, mean 30.25 ± 4.75 years) compared with IIH in remission. Serum hsa-miR-16-5p had the highest diagnostic performance for active IIH (area under the curve 0.951). Serum hsa-miR-16-5p ( Serum hsa-miR-16-5p emerged as a candidate biomarker associated with active IIH. It differentiated active disease from remission, migraine, and obesity. It correlated with clinical and metabolic markers of disease activity. These findings warrant validation in larger studies to assess its potential as a minimally invasive biomarker for IIH diagnosis and monitoring. This study provides Class III evidence that serum microRNA markers may potentially distinguish active idiopathic intracranial hypertension from remission and controls in adult women.
items.summary_ja:
背景：特発性頭蓋内高血圧症（IIH）は頭蓋内圧亢進を特徴とし、主に肥満女性に発症、頭痛や視力障害を引き起こす。診断は誤診率が高く、経過観察には侵襲的な腰椎穿刺が必要である。  
方法：IIH-Weight Trialの参加者（活動期および寛解期の成人女性IIH患者）から採取した血清および脳脊髄液（CSF）を用い、40種類の候補マイクロRNA（miRNA）発現を比較。疾患活動性はスペクトラリス光干渉断層計による乳頭浮腫の程度で評価し、肥満や片頭痛患者を対照群とした。  
結果：40種の血清miRNAのうち5種が活動期IIHで有意に低下。特にhsa-miR-16-5pは活動期IIHの診断性能が高く（AUC 0.951）、寛解期や対照群と明確に区別できた。hsa-miR-16-5pは臨床的・代謝的疾患活動性指標とも相関した。  
結論：血清hsa-miR-16-5pは活動期IIHの診断および経過観察に有望な非侵襲的バイオマーカー候補であり、さらなる大規模研究による検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 特発性頭蓋内高血圧症（IIH）患者の血清中マイクロRNA（miRNA）を解析し、活動期と寛解期での差異を検討した。40種類の候補miRNAのうち5種が活動期で有意に低下し、特にhsa-miR-16-5pは診断性能が高かった。hsa-miR-16-5pはIIHの活動性を反映し、片頭痛や肥満との鑑別にも有用であり、非侵襲的なバイオマーカーとしての可能性が示唆された。

items.title: Clinical Impact and Prognostic Value of Alzheimer Disease Biomarkers in the Very Old.
items.abstract: Alzheimer disease (AD) is increasingly viewed as a clinical-biological continuum, but the utility of biomarkers in individuals aged ≥80 years, the so-called "very old," remains uncertain, because of concerns about its clinical usefulness. This study aimed to determine the clinical impact and prognostic value of AD biomarkers in very old individuals. We performed a retrospective longitudinal cohort study within the Sant Pau Initiative on Neurodegeneration (SPIN, Barcelona, Spain), a memory clinic-based research cohort. Patients were referred from primary care physicians or community neurologists for evaluation within a public universal health care catchment area. We included SPIN participants evaluated between October 2013 and May 2024 who were aged ≥80 years and had mild cognitive impairment (MCI) at the baseline visit. Participants underwent standardized clinical and neuropsychological assessments and had CSF and plasma biomarker measurements available. AD biology was defined by the CSF phosphorylated tau at threonine 181/amyloid-β 42 ratio. Plasma phosphorylated tau at threonine 217 (p-Tau217) was evaluated for (1) diagnostic accuracy for AD biology and (2) prognostic associations with longitudinal cognitive change (Mini-Mental State Examination [MMSE]) and progression to dementia. Analyses used linear mixed-effects models for MMSE trajectories and Cox regression for dementia conversion. A total of 167 participants were included (mean age 82.3 years, 59% women) with a mean follow-up of 35.8 months; the ones with AD biology (n = 116, 69%) had worse baseline cognitive performance, particularly in memory, compared with those without (Cohen  In very old individuals with MCI, AD biology (CSF) and plasma p-Tau217 identify individuals at higher risk of faster cognitive decline and progression to dementia. Limitations of this study include the single-center design and the modest sample size.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）は臨床的・生物学的連続体とされるが、80歳以上の「超高齢者」におけるバイオマーカーの臨床的有用性は不明である。  
方法：スペイン・バルセロナのメモリークリニックを基盤としたSPINコホートの80歳以上の軽度認知障害（MCI）患者167名を対象に、脳脊髄液（CSF）中のリン酸化タウ（p-Tau181）/アミロイドβ42比および血漿中のp-Tau217を測定し、AD生物学的指標の診断精度と認知機能低下や認知症進行との関連を縦断的に解析した。  
結果：AD生物学的指標陽性群（69％）はベースラインで記憶を中心に認知機能が有意に低く、血漿p-Tau217はAD生物学の診断に有効であった。さらに、これらのバイオマーカーは認知機能の急速な低下および認知症への進行リスクの増加と関連した。  
結論：超高齢者のMCIにおいて、CSFおよび血漿のADバイオマーカーは認知機能低下と認知症進行の予測に有用である。ただし、単一施設かつサンプル数が限られる点が研究の制約である。
items.summary_short_ja: 80歳以上の軽度認知障害（MCI）患者167名を対象に、アルツハイマー病（AD）バイオマーカーの臨床的影響と予後価値を検討した。脳脊髄液中のリン酸化タウとアミロイドβ42比率で定義したAD生物学的指標および血漿中のp-Tau217は、認知機能低下の進行速度や認知症への移行リスクを予測した。これにより、非常に高齢者におけるADバイオマーカーの有用性が示されたが、単一施設での研究でサンプル数が限られる点が課題である。

items.title: Slow-Wave Sleep Fragmentation in Disorders of Arousal and Sleep-Related Hypermotor Epilepsy: A Multicenter Polysomnographic Study.
items.abstract: Disorders of arousal (DOAs) and sleep-related hypermotor epilepsy (SHE) share overlapping clinical features, making differential diagnosis challenging. Although video polysomnography remains the gold standard, EEG patterns to distinguish these conditions are not yet well defined. Slow-wave sleep (SWS) fragmentation is a key marker of DOA, but its characteristics in SHE remain unexplored. The aim of this study was to assess SWS fragmentation in DOAs and SHE, its potential diagnostic value, and overnight dynamics. Eighty-seven patients with DOAs (n = 47; mean age 23.90 ± 13.10 years; 44.7% children) or SHE (n = 40; mean age 25.11 ± 13.08 years; 27.5% children) underwent overnight polysomnography with blinded scoring. SWS fragmentation was quantified, distinguishing fast, mixed, and slow arousals, and its overnight evolution was evaluated. Groups were compared and diagnostic SWS fragmentation cutoff values were defined using receiver-operating characteristic curves. Total sleep time and sleep efficiency did not differ between groups. N2 sleep percentage was significantly lower in DOAs than in SHE ( SWS fragmentation, especially mixed and slow arousals, represents a supportive neurophysiologic marker that may assist the differential diagnostic process between DOAs and SHE. Quantitative SWS microstructure parameters may improve diagnosis and provide insight into pathophysiologic mechanisms.
items.summary_ja:
背景：覚醒障害（DOAs）と睡眠関連過運動性てんかん（SHE）は臨床症状が類似し、鑑別が困難である。ビデオポリソムノグラフィーが診断の標準だが、両者を区別する明確な脳波パターンは未確立である。特に、徐波睡眠（SWS）の断片化はDOAsの重要な指標だが、SHEにおける特徴は不明であった。  
方法：DOAs患者47名（平均年齢約24歳、約45％が小児）とSHE患者40名（平均約25歳、約28％が小児）が対象となり、盲検評価による一晩のポリソムノグラフィーを実施。SWS断片化を速い覚醒、混合覚醒、遅い覚醒に分類し、その夜間変化を解析。両群の比較と診断的カットオフ値の設定を行った。  
結果：総睡眠時間や睡眠効率に群間差はなかったが、N2睡眠の割合はDOAsで有意に低かった。SWS断片化、特に混合覚醒と遅い覚醒がDOAsに特徴的であった。  
結論：SWS断片化はDOAsとSHEの鑑別に有用な神経生理学的マーカーとなりうる。定量的なSWS微細構造解析は診断精度向上と病態理解に寄与する可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 覚醒障害（DOA）と睡眠関連過運動性てんかん（SHE）は臨床症状が類似し鑑別が困難である。本多施設研究では、87例の患者に対し夜間ポリソムノグラフィーを実施し、徐波睡眠（SWS）断片化の特徴を解析した。DOA群ではSWS断片化が顕著で、特に混合型および遅延覚醒が鑑別診断の有用な神経生理学的マーカーとなることが示された。SWSの微細構造解析は診断精度向上と病態理解に寄与すると期待される。

items.title: The Prodromal Synucleinopathy Rating Scale: An Assessment in Patients With REM Sleep Behavior Disorder.
items.abstract: Clinical trials in REM sleep behavior disorder (RBD) to delay or prevent the development of Parkinson disease (PD), dementia with Lewy bodies (DLBs), and multiple system atrophy (MSA) will soon begin. The Prodromal Synucleinopathy Rating Scale (PSRS) was developed to capture the breadth and severity of clinical burden of prodromal disease. We analyzed the clinicometric properties and reliability of the PSRS in the North American Prodromal Synucleinopathy (NAPS) cohort. PSRS ratings were examined for visits conducted from August 2022-June 2025 on participants who did not have overt PD, DLB, or MSA (n = 348). Clinician raters used clinical judgement to evaluate signs and symptoms within each domain. Scores range from 0 (none) to a maximum of 2-4 points per domain, with a total maximum score of 25. The domains include cognitive (COG), behavioral/psychiatric (PSY), motor-axial (MAX), motor-appendicular (MAP), autonomic (AUT), sleep (SLP), and sensory (SEN). Spearman correlations were generated between ratings for each domain, the total sum score (SUM), and with independent measures of similar constructs. Test-retest reliability for 20 case examples protocols among 20 different raters was quantified using Bayesian generalized linear mixed-effects model. Participants were 79% male with a mean age of 65.4 ± 10.4 years. The following correlations were statistically significant at  In this large multicenter RBD cohort, moderate to strong correlations were observed between PSRS domains and multiple independent measures of clinical burden. Reliability data were good to excellent. These findings demonstrate preliminary validity for the PSRS for measuring synucleinopathy clinical burden in those with RBD. NCT05826457 NAPS Consortium Website: naps-rbd.org/.
items.summary_ja:
背景：REM睡眠行動障害（RBD）はパーキンソン病（PD）、レビー小体型認知症（DLBs）、多系統萎縮症（MSA）などのシヌクレイノパチー発症の前駆症状として注目されている。これらの疾患の発症遅延や予防を目的とした臨床試験開始に先立ち、前駆期の臨床負荷を評価する尺度の開発が求められている。  
方法：前駆期シヌクレイノパチー評価尺度（PSRS）を用い、北米のNAPSコホート（RBD患者348名、PD/DLB/MSA未発症）における臨床的特性と信頼性を検証した。PSRSは認知、行動・精神、運動（体幹・四肢）、自律神経、睡眠、感覚の7領域を評価し、合計点は最大25点。評価は臨床医の判断に基づき行われ、検査再検査信頼性は20症例を20名の評価者で分析した。  
結果：参加者の平均年齢は65.4歳、79％が男性。PSRS各領域と独立した臨床指標との相関は中等度から強く、検査再検査信頼性も良好から優秀であった。  
結論：PSRSはRBD患者におけるシヌクレイノパチーの臨床負荷を測定するための有効かつ信頼性の高い評価尺度であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、REM睡眠行動障害（RBD）患者の前駆期シヌクレイノパチーの臨床負荷を評価するために開発されたProdromal Synucleinopathy Rating Scale（PSRS）の信頼性と妥当性を検証した。348名のRBD患者を対象に多施設で評価を行い、各領域のスコアと独立した臨床指標との相関は中程度から強く、検査再検査信頼性も良好であった。PSRSはRBD患者のシヌクレイノパチー臨床負荷測定に有用であることが示された。

items.title: Machine Diagnostics and Machine Phenotyping of Migraine: A HUNT Study.
items.abstract: In the absence of biomarkers, the true biological footprint of migraine remains incompletely understood. It could perhaps be best characterized using machine learning models of multimodal data. The aim of this study was to (1) develop diagnostic models of migraine using multimodal data and (2) identify data-driven migraine phenotypes. This was a cross-sectional machine learning analysis of demographics, self-reported clinical and headache data, and genome-wide genotype data from the Trøndelag Health Study (data collected 1995-1997 and 2006-2008). All participants who were genotyped and completed the headache questionnaire were included. First, predictive machine learning models were developed using genotype data and general clinical data (excluding headache data) to diagnose individuals with migraine vs headache-free controls. Models were optimized on a training set and evaluated on a held-out test set, scored with the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC). Second, unsupervised models were trained on the headache data and the most predictive features from the diagnostic models to identify subgroups. The subgroups were compared using genome-wide association analyses, conventional polygenic risk scores (PRSs), and machine learning-based genetic risk scores. A total of 43,197 individuals were included in the diagnostic models, and 12,185 individuals were included in the data-driven phenotyping (mean [SD] age 49.1 [16.7] years; 51.7% women). The top-performing diagnostic model was a light gradient boosting machine, with a test set AUC of 0.80 (95% CI 0.78-0.81). Two main clusters were identified, one with 1,425 individuals, 94% of whom met diagnostic criteria for migraine, and another with 10,760 individuals, whereof 71% had nonmigraine headaches. The former was subclustered into 4 relatively distinct groups: one with only men, one with prominent neck pain, one with more musculoskeletal pain, anxiety and depression, and one with "classic" migraine. The groups were better discriminated by machine learning-based genetic risk scores compared with PRSs. Migraine can accurately be diagnosed from nonheadache data, suggesting that it is biologically describable by combinations of clinical, genetic, and environmental data. Data-driven phenotyping with such data identifies migraine subgroups with distinct phenotypic and genotypic signals, possibly not captured by current diagnostic criteria-but with potential implications for management.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の生物学的特徴はバイオマーカーがなく十分に解明されていない。多様なデータを用いた機械学習モデルでの解析が有効と考えられる。  
方法：ノルウェーのTrøndelag Health Studyの人口統計、自己申告の臨床・頭痛データ、全ゲノム遺伝子型データを用いた横断的機械学習解析を実施。頭痛の有無を診断するモデルを遺伝子型と一般臨床データから構築し、さらに頭痛データと診断モデルの特徴を用いた非教師ありクラスタリングで片頭痛のデータ駆動型フェノタイプを同定した。  
結果：43,197名の診断モデルで、LightGBMによるモデルがAUC0.80を達成。12,185名のフェノタイピングでは、94%が片頭痛の1,425名のクラスターと、71%が非片頭痛頭痛の10,760名のクラスターに分類された。片頭痛クラスターはさらに4つの特徴的サブグループに分かれ、機械学習ベースの遺伝的リスクスコアが従来の多遺伝子リスクスコアよりも群分けに優れていた。  
結論：片頭痛は頭痛以外の臨床・遺伝・環境データの組み合わせで高精度に診断可能であり、データ駆動型フェノタイピングにより従来の診断基準では捉えきれない多様な片頭痛サブタイプが明らかになった。これらは治療方針の改善に寄与する可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、頭痛バイオマーカーがない中で、多様なデータを用いた機械学習により片頭痛の診断モデル構築とデータ駆動型の片頭痛表現型の同定を目指した。約4万3千人のデータから、非頭痛データで片頭痛を高精度（AUC=0.80）に診断可能と示し、さらに頭痛特徴と遺伝情報に基づく4つの異なる片頭痛サブグループを特定。これらは従来の診断基準では捉えにくい遺伝的・臨床的特徴を持ち、治療方針への応用が期待される。

items.title: Fecal Microbiota Transplantation in Parkinson Disease: A Systematic Review, Meta-Analysis, and Meta-Regression.
items.abstract: Parkinson disease (PD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder increasingly linked to gut microbiota dysbiosis, which may influence disease mechanisms and symptom expression. Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) targets the gut-brain axis, but clinical evidence remains inconsistent. This study aimed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of FMT in PD. We conducted a systematic review and meta-analysis following Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses guidelines, with protocol registration in International Prospective Register of Systematic Reviews (CRD420251142846). MEDLINE, Embase, and the Cochrane Library were searched from inception through September 2025. Randomized controlled trials (RCTs) and observational studies enrolling adults with mild-to-moderate PD who received FMT through any administration route were eligible. The primary outcome was motor function assessed by the Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale (UPDRS) part III. Secondary outcomes included UPDRS part II, quality of life (Parkinson's Disease Questionnaire-39 [PDQ-39]), constipation severity (Wexner score), and adverse events. Random-effects models pooled effect estimates with 95% CIs, and exploratory meta-regression assessed follow-up duration, publication year, and sample size. Eight studies (5 RCTs and 3 observational studies) including 220 participants were analyzed. The mean age ranged from approximately 60 to 70 years, and women comprised about 40% of participants. FMT was associated with significant improvement in motor function (UPDRS part III: mean difference [MD] -9.67, 95% CI -16.81 to -2.53) and constipation severity (Wexner score: MD -3.91, 95% CI -7.68 to -0.13). Improvements in UPDRS part II and PDQ-39 were observed at 12 weeks but not sustained at 24 weeks. In RCT-only analyses, UPDRS part III improvement remained significant (MD -6.82, 95% CI -11.23 to -2.40), whereas other outcomes were not consistently significant. Meta-regression indicated that longer follow-up was associated with greater improvement in UPDRS part II ( FMT may provide short-term improvements in motor and gastrointestinal symptoms in PD, but effects appear transient. Small sample sizes, heterogeneity, and limited follow-up restrict conclusions, underscoring the need for larger randomized trials. Pooled estimates reflected evidence from observational studies and should be interpreted cautiously.
items.summary_ja:
背景：パーキンソン病（PD）は進行性の神経変性疾患で、腸内細菌叢の異常が病態や症状に影響すると考えられている。糞便微生物移植（FMT）は腸脳軸を標的とするが、臨床効果は不確実である。  
方法：PD患者を対象にしたRCTおよび観察研究を系統的にレビュー・メタ解析し、UPDRSパートIIIによる運動機能改善を主要評価項目とした。副次評価項目はUPDRSパートII、生活の質（PDQ-39）、便秘重症度（Wexnerスコア）、有害事象。8研究（220例）を対象にランダム効果モデルとメタ回帰を実施。  
結果：FMTは運動機能（UPDRS III：平均差-9.67）と便秘（Wexnerスコア：平均差-3.91）に有意な改善を示した。UPDRS IIとPDQ-39は12週で改善したが24週では持続せず、RCT解析でもUPDRS IIIのみ有意改善が確認された。メタ回帰では追跡期間の延長がUPDRS II改善と関連。  
結論：FMTはPDの運動症状および消化器症状に短期的な改善効果を示すが、効果は一過性であり、小規模かつ異質な研究が多いため、大規模RCTによる検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: パーキンソン病（PD）に対する糞便微生物移植（FMT）の効果と安全性を評価したシステマティックレビューとメタ解析を実施。8件の研究（220例）で、FMTは運動機能（UPDRS III）と便秘症状の短期的改善に有意な効果を示したが、生活の質や日常生活機能の改善は持続せず、長期効果は不明。サンプル数や追跡期間の制約から結論は限定的で、さらなる大規模RCTが必要とされた。
